=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithPipe.ts ---
// refactor: 4:23-4:46
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const result = pipe(Effect.succeed("hello"))


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/wrapWithPipe.ts ---
// refactor: 4:23-4:46
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const result = Effect.gen(function*() { return yield* Effect.succeed("hello") })
